title: Entry Identity, Idempotent Upsert, Revisions, and Deletion Semantics · Language Lens: Feed Go Upsert Invariants
summary: Every poll inserts duplicates, title edits create new posts, reused GUIDs overwrite unrelated content, disappeared entries are deleted immediately, and revision causes vanish. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Insert new, ignore unchanged, version changed, and quarantine conflicting entries atomically under unique constraints.

For Feed aggregation and Go Defend the Feed Go Upsert Invariants model · Theory Feed Go Upsert Invarian…, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE makes any feed import idempotent.
